    Data Gathering for Irrigationby Waziup e.V. • 3h • Advanced

    Automated Temperature Controlby Waziup e.V. • 2h • Intermediate

    The Automated Temperature Control System is Global Impact Project (GIP) solution designed for residential and small-scale indoor environments, particularly in regions with warm and humid climates such as Dar es Salaam, Tanzania, where maintaining thermal comfort can be challenging and that require an affordable, automated, energy-efficient temperature regulation solution.

    Fire Smoke Detectionby Waziup e.V. • 0h 0m • Not Specified

    When a fire breaks out, time is of the essence. Prompt measures need to be taken to evacuate the trapped people and contain the fire before it spreads out of hand.

    Automatic Irrigationby Waziup e.V. • 2h • Beginner

    As you may already know, plants require water, light (usually sunlight), nutrients etc, ... to grow healthy.

    Automatic Water Level Controllerby Waziup e.V. • 2h • Intermediate

    Its very common to see water storage tanks overflowing in most places where a pump is used. These overflows lead to wastage of water and higher electricity bills due to the water pumps running longer than necessary.

    Cattle Rustlingby Waziup e.V. • 2h • Intermediate

    Cattle rustlings is increasingly becoming a major problem in many parts of Africa in recent years. Despite the growing level of cattle theft and its consequences for society, the situation has yet to receive an effective intervention.

    Tomato Freshness Detectorby Waziup e.V. • 3h • Intermediate

    The Tomato Freshness Detector is Global Impact Project (GIP) solution designed as an IoT-based tomato spoilage detection system that integrates sensors, Firebase cloud service, machine learning and a mobile application built with Kotlin.

    Weather Stationby Waziup e.V. • 3h • Intermediate

    A weather station is a facility, either on land or sea, with instruments and equipment for measuring atmospheric conditions to provide information for weather forecasts and to study the weather and climate.
